title: chilocarpus costatus
intro: Chilocarpus costatus, also known as the "Brahmibutas" or "Clerodendrum", is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate fever. The health benefits of Chilocarpus costatus include its potential to treat various health conditions such as digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin infections. Herbal preparations of Chilocarpus costatus can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea that can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
